suite.mantra: AI Systems Architects Best Practices Suite: Rapid Full Deployment and SDLC Recursive Suite

pillars.rapid_full_deployment: seat-keyed models + purpose-keyed prompts as data; pinned loadout; harvest-first; parallel disjoint-writer builds merged under the merkle-dag discipline — idea to verified, enrolled sub-system in one governed pass
pillars.sdlc_recursive: the lifecycle applies to itself: pre-review -> comprehension-gated implementation -> machine-verified records -> retrospective -> next-phase Daedalus review -> the next cycle's inputs. TELOS gated its own upgrade; the memory layer documents its own construction; the lifecycle governed the slice that built the lifecycle

note: Machine-readable system map. A repository scanner should build its architectural map from THIS file, not by ranking README language. Each claim carries a grade + evidence; a scanner verifies claims against evidence and rejects any claim contradicted by a NON-CLAIMS record. Roles are registered mythological terms (docs/mythological-vocabulary.md) — no coined names.

entry_points.example_readers: docs/institutional-memory/examples/ contains non-exhaustive worked TELOS-gate fixtures with module-specific names; ai-native-memory uses memory/answers-example.json with its native gate, and Atropos fixtures live in its run evidence

superseded_docs.note: Present in the repo but must_not_govern_new_work — see CURRENT-AUTHORITY.json#superseded

components.name: clotho
components.role_meaning: creates and maintains knowledge-graph threads across artifacts and repositories
components.purpose: provenance-aware knowledge-graph weaver over the TELOS spine

claims.statement: PACKAGE_ROOTS is exactly the seven consciously enrolled TELOS-spine packages with an explicit tested exclusion of the five deferred products (AM-40 plus Iliad enrollment)
the shared D33 scanner is correct over a closed source profile and fails closed on b1-b6 (AM-41)
committed weaver inventories are proven equal to their derived closures
the frozen inventory-id table and the D32 loader-safe-exports map are exact and frozen
Phase 1 tasks 0-7 are accepted; the committed self-weave executes all five weavers and its reproduction, flagship, and closure oracles pass

non_claims: not a JavaScript sandbox
not a complete ECMAScript parser
does not prove loader analysis or containment
does not authorize, enforce risk classes, or retire artifacts

components.name: lachesis
components.role_meaning: measures dependencies, relevance, risk, and blast radius
components.purpose: zero-dependency metrics engine over the committed Clotho weave snapshot
components.trust_domain: deterministic measurement; risk class advisory; manifest-relative snapshot integrity only

claims.statement: dependency, blast-radius, relevance, and risk semantics are pinned to the current committed snapshot by discriminating and golden oracles
the package is zero-dependency and never imports from clotho/

non_claims: does not authorize or enforce its advisory risk class
does not re-derive Clotho content-addressed node identity
does not verify the Clotho signature chain or establish a durable trust root

components.name: atropos
components.role_meaning: retires obsolete relationships, artifacts, tools, and processes
components.purpose: cycle-1 read-only supersession-consistency verifier over CURRENT-AUTHORITY.json#superseded
components.trust_domain: deterministic read-only verification; retirement action remains human-governed

claims.statement: the real v11-v14 retirement chain resolves consistently to the disk-verified active v15 authority
cycle 1 is read-only, zero-dependency, and does not import from clotho/

non_claims: does not mutate CURRENT-AUTHORITY.json or perform a retirement
does not authenticate authority or authorize action
node-backed retirement remains deferred in cycle 1

components.name: ai-native-memory
components.role_note: implemented plugin/product component; no mythological role is asserted
components.purpose: portable, zero-dependency institutional-memory plugin with fail-closed audit, verify, gate, and initialization commands
components.trust_domain: deterministic local record validation; host-provided oracle execution is explicit

claims.statement: the plugin's frozen semantics, zero-dependency boundary, dogfood record set, and six test groups are executable

non_claims: is not a mythological role module
is not enrolled in the Iliad lifecycle while AM-40 deferral remains active
does not replace repository-specific documentation or CI

components.name: build-gate
components.role_note: implements the TELOS gate (TELOS governs review/evidence/authorization/execution); mythological ownership is not asserted for the package name per docs/mythological-vocabulary.md
components.purpose: the gate (gate.mjs), per-seat HMAC signing, the council orchestrator, and the Daedalus workshop
components.trust_domain: certifies from disk + signatures + provenance, never a self-report

components.name: breakout
components.purpose: adversarial self-challenge + verdict-on-facts (verifier.mjs) and a minimal MCP stdio client

components.name: connectors/ai-peer-mcp
components.purpose: MCP server exposing model backends with real per-seat provenance
components.trust_domain: provider-native structured output; provenance != HMAC signature

components.name: merkle-dag
components.purpose: content-addressed planning, Ed25519 verified delegation, append-only signed ledger, pure done() gate

components.name: contracts
components.purpose: the human-readable protocol the gate enforces

role_modules.name: daedalus
role_modules.kind: role module — a registered role realized by code + protocol + run lineage, not a top-level package
role_modules.status: active (serial loop for small deltas; parallel authorship HELD by The Eye 2026-07-15, implemented fail-closed)

claims.statement: workshop protocol constants and every claimed state-machine terminal equal what build-gate/daedalus.mjs enforces (terminals probed, not paraphrased)
the plan-maturation chain v11-v15 re-hashes from disk and matches CURRENT-AUTHORITY.json exactly (one active version; the two authorization refusals preserved)
a parallel-authorship request without an adapter blocks (PARALLEL_AUTHORSHIP_UNAVAILABLE) rather than silently downgrading to serial

non_claims: does not authorize (TELOS does; convergence is not authorization)
does not implement (Argo's role)
does not validate plan content truth (process structure only)
no autonomous Daedalus service exists
cannot amend an Eye ruling (fixed input)

role_modules.name: telos
role_modules.role_meaning: governs review, evidence, authorization, and execution boundaries
role_modules.kind: role module — the governance function, NOT the repository of the same name (ownership is not inferred from the repo name; AM-40 governs products beside the spine)
role_modules.status: active (authz-001..008 recorded, all trust_mode signed; five refusals preserved; authz-008 active)

claims.statement: the authorization chain authz-001..008 matches its on-disk records exactly (ids, statuses, plan refs, signed mode); reviewable plans re-hash from disk; the active entry equals CURRENT-AUTHORITY

the council roster is exactly required {claude,agy,codex} + advisory {grok,gemini} (planSeats probed); signed mode enforced signature+provenance on the recorded pass and the recorded refusal carries the codex-revise dissent

non_claims: authorization does not execute code (Argo implements)
a model approval is not human authority (The Eye; convergence is not authorization)
the gate cannot prove an id is genuine from disk (binding happens at generation time)
a pass is not a correctness proof beyond what the checks check
the role is not the repo (AM-40)

role_modules.name: argo
role_modules.role_meaning: carries an authorized plan through implementation, verification, and documentation
role_modules.kind: role module — a workflow with code touchpoints; NO autonomous Argo runner exists (system non-claim, preserved)
role_modules.status: active (slices 4a, 4b, 5, 6, and 7 accepted; no next or pending slice)

claims.statement: the accepted-slice ledger deep-equals CURRENT-AUTHORITY.implementation_authority (holder, governs, slices, next, pending) and every cited slice record (13-round signed review, gate meets, deferred backlog) exists and matches
the entry ritual is real and fail-closed: verify-contracts EXECUTES the comprehension gate — the correct example reader exits 0 (GRANTED) and the hallucinating reader exits 3 (DENIED)

non_claims: no autonomous Argo runner exists
a passing gate artifact is a precondition, not implementation authority (The Eye grants)
the comprehension gate is open-book (proves record-reading + authority resolution, not deep understanding)
only authority_anchor.pointer fields are live-resolved authority; other anchor metadata is an evidence citation from the reviewed query artifact
acceptance is not a zero-defect claim (slice 4a carries a deferred backlog)
Argo does not choose scope (ambiguities escalate; never designed around)

role_modules.name: iliad
role_modules.role_meaning: the system-of-systems lifecycle umbrella under which registered components coordinate the creation, governance, maintenance, recovery, evolution, and retirement of enrolled systems
role_modules.kind: role module — the implementation lifecycle (pre-review -> enrolled sub-system -> retrospective); no orchestrator service exists
role_modules.status: active (protocol instituted 2026-07-17; first enrollment: institutional-memory-role-modules, delivered with retrospective; products remain AM-40-deferred)

claims.statement: enrollment integrity is machine-verified: every entry's evidence and memory dirs exist; delivered requires a retrospective whose every optimization names where it lands; post-protocol entries require a recorded pre-review; the deferred list deep-equals the AM-40 exclusions

non_claims: no autonomous Iliad orchestrator exists
enrollment is not absorption into the spine (AM-40)
the verifier cannot detect an implementation that never registered
the pre-review records model intent; per-seat provenance proves actuality
retrospective optimizations are advisory until adopted by a run or a reviewed change

products.name: narcissus/flagship
products.purpose: award-standard TELOS development-story front-end (Loom on Trial)

claims.statement: the implemented React/Vite product exposes runnable build, unit-test, and evidence-verification entry points

non_claims: does not implement the registered Narcissus role module
is not enrolled in the Iliad lifecycle while AM-40 deferral remains active

future_modules.name: hermes
future_modules.role_meaning: API management and inter-system communication: routing, contracts, translation, and delivery.

future_modules.name: medusa
future_modules.role_meaning: defensive edge enforcement; blocks or quarantines hostile and nonconforming traffic.

future_modules.name: narcissus
future_modules.role_meaning: production of full-rollout, award-standard front-ends for enrolled products through the reflection loop: iterative UI rendering and visual review, repeated until the surface is genuinely beautiful, distinctive, and functionally complete.

future_modules_note: Registered mythological terms with defined system responsibilities and NO implementation yet — reserved WITH meaning (docs/mythological-vocabulary.md; meanings verbatim, machine-checked). Do not coin, do not assume existence; implementing one follows CHANGE-PROTOCOL + the Iliad lifecycle. Machine copy of record: docs/institutional-memory/iliad/CONTRACTS/enrollment.json#future_modules_registered_unimplemented (verify-contracts requires the two lists equal).

capability_modules.name: loadout
capability_modules.kind: capability module — the development loadout (tools, seat backends, plugins, review harness, per-task optimization reviews); named from the code's own term seat-registry.mjs#withLoadout, not a mythological role
capability_modules.status: active (seat routes pinned + probed; loadout extension declared; historical per-task reviews retained for completed slices 4b/5/6/7)

claims.statement: every seat route, server framing, and the no-shadow invariant equal what seat-registry.mjs builds (registry rebuilt and deep-checked; shadow attempt probed and refused; extension mechanism probed and admitted)

the capability-packet field set equals the committed worked example, and both fail-closed and passing fixtures exist; every pending slice carries an ADVISORY loadout+optimization review with a non-empty opportunities list

non_claims: session skills/plugins are not pinned by the repo
the registry names backends, not models
task-loadout reviews are advisory (capability packets are the enforced form)
plugin server bytes are not verified (routes are)
malformed loadout files fail silently (recorded; warning is a candidate improvement)
